name: @forwardimpact/libterrain
description: Full synthetic data pipeline — generate, render, and validate evaluation datasets end to end.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Setting up an eval and realizing you need to coordinate generation, rendering, and validation across three libraries.
jobs.bigHire: produce a complete eval dataset from a single DSL file.
jobs.littleHire: regenerate a dataset after a schema change and trust the pipeline handles the rest.
jobs.competesWith: scripting the pipeline by hand; coordinating libraries manually; using stale fixtures and hoping they still apply
